title: He Raised $26M Betting on Probabilities, Not Guesses | Koah Labs, Nic Baird
summary: Nic Baird founded Koah Labs, an ad monetization platform for AI tools, and raised $26M. The platform addresses a market gap by offering ads as an alternative to subscription models for AI applications.
